country.name: Vietnam
country.chinese_buy: 咖啡、纺织品与食品礼物
country.tip: Hanoi’s Old Quarter is a great place to compare craft shops; gentle haggling is expected.
country.chinese_tip: 河内老城区适合比较不同工艺店；温和议价很常见。
country.shopping_location: Supermarkets, Old Quarter, and craft stores

products.name: Archcafé coconut coffee box
products.description: Coconut-flavoured Vietnamese coffee with contemporary gift packaging.
products.why_buy: The coconut profile makes it a distinctively tropical coffee souvenir.
products.typical_overseas_price: Difficult to find abroad and often imported at a premium.
products.savings: Buy locally for better selection and price.
products.best_shops: Craft-Link, Lotte Mart and King Kong Mart.

reviews.body: Recognisable packaging, easy to pack, and a good choice for sharing.

products.name: Bánh dừa coconut cookies
products.note: Pack rigid boxes to prevent breakage.
products.description: Crisp Vietnamese coconut cookies made for tea and coffee breaks.
products.why_buy: The natural coconut flavour makes this a simple, shareable food gift.
products.typical_overseas_price: Imported boxes tend to cost more and have less choice.
products.savings: Buy locally for better selection and price.
products.best_shops: Big C, King Kong Mart, Co.opmart and market stalls.

reviews.body: Recognisable packaging, easy to pack, and a good choice for sharing.

products.name: G7 3-in-1 instant coffee box
products.description: The easy, sweet instant-coffee version of the Vietnamese coffee ritual.
products.why_buy: It is simple to share and easy to make without a phin.
products.savings: Buy locally for better selection and price.
products.best_shops: Supermarkets, convenience stores and Trung Nguyên counters.

reviews.body: Recognisable packaging, easy to pack, and a good choice for sharing.

products.name: Galant durian four-layer candy
products.note: Check destination food rules before flying.
products.description: A durian variation of Galant’s layered coconut-and-nut sweet.
products.why_buy: It is a distinctly tropical variation for people who enjoy a very sweet durian flavour.
products.savings: Buy locally for better selection and price.
products.best_shops: Gift shops, traditional markets and supermarkets.
products.airport_availability: Availability varies; buy before the airport.

reviews.body: Recognisable packaging, easy to pack, and a good choice for sharing.

products.name: Galant four-layer coconut candy
products.note: Choose individually wrapped pieces for sharing.
products.description: A four-layer sweet with coconut shreds, crisp pastry, butter and nuts.
products.why_buy: The contrast of crisp coconut coating and soft, nutty centre is a classic gift.
products.typical_overseas_price: Rarely found overseas; imported versions cost more.
products.savings: Buy locally for better selection and price.
products.best_shops: Gift shops, traditional markets and major supermarkets.
products.airport_availability: Sometimes available in airport snack shops.

reviews.body: Recognisable packaging, easy to pack, and a good choice for sharing.

products.name: Hà Đông silk ao dai scarf
products.note: Ask whether the silk is natural or blended.
products.description: A compact silk accessory inspired by Vietnam’s áo dài tradition.
products.why_buy: It carries the elegance of áo dài without the bulk of a full outfit.
products.typical_overseas_price: Often priced far higher through overseas boutiques.
products.savings: Buy locally for better selection and price.
products.best_shops: Compare Hanoi Old Quarter silk shops and tailor districts.
products.airport_availability: Limited; buy in town for selection.

photos.alt_text: Hà Đông silk ao dai scarf

reviews.body: Recognisable packaging, easy to pack, and a good choice for sharing.
Packed well and made a thoughtful gift. I would buy it again from a local shop.
Good value compared with imported options; check the label and keep the receipt.

products.name: Hạ Thái lacquer mini painting
products.note: Choose a flat, small work for easy packing.
products.description: A small lacquer painting linked to Hanoi’s long-running craft-village tradition.
products.why_buy: It is a portable alternative to bulky decorative lacquerware.
products.typical_overseas_price: Rarely stocked abroad; specialist pieces command a premium.
products.savings: Buy locally for better selection and price.
products.best_shops: Hà Thái craft village and Hanoi artisan stores.
products.online_availability: Available from artisan marketplaces; check packaging.

reviews.body: Recognisable packaging, easy to pack, and a good choice for sharing.
Packed well and made a thoughtful gift. I would buy it again from a local shop.
Good value compared with imported options; check the label and keep the receipt.

products.name: King Coffee 3-in-1 blend
products.note: Check the blend and sachet count.
products.description: A robust instant blend from a fast-growing Vietnamese coffee brand.
products.why_buy: It offers a strong alternative for travellers who enjoy a bolder cup.
products.savings: Buy locally for better selection and price.
products.best_shops: Lotte Mart, supermarkets and convenience stores.
products.airport_availability: Often stocked at airport gift shops.

reviews.body: Recognisable packaging, easy to pack, and a good choice for sharing.

products.name: Lotus tea gift tin
products.note: Pick a sealed tin and check the scent level.
products.description: Fragrant tea associated with Vietnamese tea culture.
products.why_buy: It is a polished, low-bulk gift for tea drinkers.
products.typical_overseas_price: Specialty imports are usually far more expensive.
products.savings: Buy locally for better selection and price.
products.best_shops: Hanoi tea houses, specialty stores and Lotte Mart.

reviews.body: Recognisable packaging, easy to pack, and a good choice for sharing.

products.name: Marou single-origin chocolate bar
products.description: Vietnamese bean-to-bar chocolate using cacao from named local regions.
products.why_buy: It combines a polished gift format with a strong Vietnamese ingredient story.
products.typical_overseas_price: Often costs substantially more in overseas specialty shops.
products.savings: Buy locally for better selection and price.
products.best_shops: Maison Marou, Lotte Mart and premium grocers.
products.online_availability: Available internationally through specialty chocolate shops.

reviews.body: Recognisable packaging, easy to pack, and a good choice for sharing.

products.name: Minh Ngọc mung bean cake
products.note: Keep the box dry and avoid crushing.
products.description: A soft, crumbly mung-bean confection for pairing with tea.
products.why_buy: It is a classic old-style sweet that is easy to serve to guests.
products.savings: Buy locally for better selection and price.
products.best_shops: Hanoi specialty shops, supermarkets and markets.

reviews.body: Recognisable packaging, easy to pack, and a good choice for sharing.

products.name: Mr. Viet coconut coffee gift box
products.note: Select an assortment for office gifting.
products.chinese_name: Mr. Viet 椰子咖啡礼盒
products.description: Modern Vietnamese coffee sachets with bold, gift-ready packaging.
products.why_buy: Mr. Viet offers coconut, hazelnut and cappuccino variations for different tastes.
products.typical_overseas_price: Often unavailable or expensive outside Vietnam.
products.savings: Buy locally for better selection and price.
products.best_shops: Circle K, Lotte Mart and Big C.

photos.alt_text: Mr. Viet coconut coffee gift box

reviews.body: Recognisable packaging, easy to pack, and a good choice for sharing.

products.name: Như Hương roasted cashew gift bag
products.description: A branded roasted-cashew gift bag made for easy sharing.
products.why_buy: Vietnamese cashews are a practical, crowd-pleasing suitcase staple.
products.typical_overseas_price: Imported packs are commonly 30–70% more expensive.
products.savings: Buy locally for better selection and price.
products.best_shops: Lotte Mart, Co.opmart, Ben Thanh Market specialty stalls.
products.airport_availability: Often available in departure snack shops.

photos.alt_text: Như Hương roasted cashew gift bag

reviews.body: Recognisable packaging, easy to pack, and a good choice for sharing.
Packed well and made a thoughtful gift. I would buy it again from a local shop.
Good value compared with imported options; check the label and keep the receipt.

products.name: SABAVA banana chips
products.note: Protect bags from crushing in checked luggage.
products.description: A widely recommended Vietnamese banana-chip souvenir.
products.why_buy: It is light, crunchy and easy to split between colleagues.
products.savings: Buy locally for better selection and price.
products.best_shops: Supermarkets, convenience stores and gift shops.
products.online_availability: Available through Southeast Asian food marketplaces.

reviews.body: Recognisable packaging, easy to pack, and a good choice for sharing.

products.name: Trung Nguyên Legend coffee + phin
products.note: Look for sealed roast dates and a stainless phin.
products.chinese_name: 中原传奇咖啡与滴漏壶
products.description: A roasted-ground coffee and phin pairing from Vietnam’s best-known coffee house.
products.why_buy: It is the classic way to recreate a slow Vietnamese coffee at home.
products.typical_overseas_price: Usually imported at a 30–70% premium, when stocked at all.
products.savings: Buy locally for better selection and price.
products.best_shops: Trung Nguyên Legend stores, Lotte Mart and Co.opmart
products.airport_availability: Available at selected international airport gift shops.
products.online_availability: Sold by specialist marketplaces; verify freshness.

reviews.body: Recognisable packaging, easy to pack, and a good choice for sharing.
Packed well and made a thoughtful gift. I would buy it again from a local shop.
Good value compared with imported options; check the label and keep the receipt.

products.name: Vifon pho seasoning pack
products.note: Buy a variety pack and check expiry dates.
products.description: A pantry pack designed to recreate a Vietnamese pho-style meal at home.
products.why_buy: It is one of the easiest ways to bring a familiar Vietnamese flavour home.
products.typical_overseas_price: Usually marked up in overseas Asian stores.
products.savings: Buy locally for better selection and price.
products.airport_availability: Often found in airport food sections.

reviews.body: Recognisable packaging, easy to pack, and a good choice for sharing.

products.name: Vinamit dried fruit mix
products.note: Look for banana, jackfruit and taro varieties.
products.description: A crunchy mix of dried Vietnamese fruit and vegetables.
products.why_buy: It gives a broad tasting tour in a compact, shelf-stable pack.
products.typical_overseas_price: Imported snack packs usually carry a premium.
products.savings: Buy locally for better selection and price.
products.best_shops: Big C, Co.opmart and Lotte Mart.

reviews.body: Recognisable packaging, easy to pack, and a good choice for sharing.

products.name: Yến Hoàng Bến Tre coconut candy
products.note: Choose sealed packs with a clear best-before date.
products.description: Chewy coconut candy made in the Mekong Delta’s famous coconut region.
products.why_buy: A friendly, shareable taste of Bến Tre with coffee and durian flavours.
products.typical_overseas_price: Usually imported at a premium, if available.
products.savings: Buy locally for better selection and price.
products.best_shops: Co.opmart, Big C and Bến Tre specialty shops.
products.airport_availability: Common in snack and duty-free sections.

photos.alt_text: Yến Hoàng Bến Tre coconut candy
